final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a cozy everyday cat scene featuring an orange tabby cat (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "治愈系" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Japanese iyashikei anime visual culture (e.g. 日常系 slice-of-life illustration), 北欧 hygge cozy-home illustration tradition, Studio Ghibli warm domestic scene painting; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include the orange tabby cat lying on a windowsill as the centered focal subject, with the snowy winter street scene visible through the window behind
Subject: must include the orange tabby cat (one), basking in sunlight on the windowsill
Scene/backdrop: must include a warm indoor setting contrasted with a snowy winter street scene outside the window
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, soft, heart-melting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm indoor tone contrasted with cool wintry blue-grey outside — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a fluffy, fur-textured, soft surface treatment — exact grain and sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
